SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-30-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $2078. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE RULING ISSUED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 5/9/16. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HANAI IBRAHIM OR DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
